COUNSEL FOR BOTH SIDES TO WORK TOGETHER ON A PROPOSED ORDER BASED ON THE TENTATIVE RULING AND ORAL ARGUMENTS. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

calendar.matters:
Motion Of Defendants Hc 650 Sacramento, Llc; Himel Capital, Llc; And Elliot Zemel For Good Faith Settlement Determination
Off Calendar Feb-19-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Thomas Loran lll, 415.983.1865 for Defendants HC 650 Sacramento, Elliot Zemel and Himel Capital.
Nicholas Muscolino, 510.273.8780 for Defendants Starcity Properties, Jess Sarez and Jon Dishotsky.

Argued. The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT HC 650 SACRAMENTO, LLC, ELLIOT ZEMEL, HIMEL CAPITAL LLC Motion Of Defendants Hc 650 Sacramento, Llc; Himel Capital, Llc; And Elliot Zemel For Good Faith Settlement Determination is GRANTED. To the extent the moving defendants paid $225,000 for the settlement of the action, barring any claims by the non-moving defendants from any further claims against the moving defendant for equitable comparative contribution, or partial comparative indemnity, based on comparative negligence or comparative fault. Counsel for both sides to work together on a proposed order based on the tentative ruling and oral arguments. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Motion Of Defendants Hc 650 Sacramento, Llc; Himel Capital, Llc; And Elliot Zemel For Good Faith Settlement Determination
Off Calendar Jan-16-2020 Continued To Feb-19-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HC 650 SACRAMENTO, LLC, ELLIOT ZEMEL, HIMEL CAPITAL LLC Motion Of Defendants Hc 650 Sacramento, Llc; Himel Capital, Llc; And Elliot Zemel For Good Faith Settlement Determination
is continued to February 19, 2020 for the moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of reply no later than January 31, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Motion Of Defendants Hc 650 Sacramento, Llc; Elliot Zemel; And Himel Capital, Llc For Good Faith Settlement Determination
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HC 650 SACRAMENTO, LLC, ELLIOT ZEMEL, HIMEL CAPITAL LLC Motion Of Defendants Hc 650 Sacramento, Llc; Elliot Zemel; And Himel Capital, Llc For Good Faith Settlement Determination
is DENIED without prejudice. While the moving party asserts that it meets Tech-Bilt factors (Motion 2:15-16) no discussion of the factors or facts relevant thereto is provided in the 8-line "Argument" section of the brief. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Off Calendar
